properties.Deficiency_Type: Physical Deficiency, Physical Deficiency, Physical Deficiency, Regulatory Deficiency, Regulatory Deficiency, Regulatory Deficiency
properties.Deficiency_Description: Conduct a comprehensive safety assessment of the dams by a PEng and submit to the Commission with recommendations, Conduct a formal annual inspection by a P.ENG and submit a copy of the inspection report to the Commission , Consult with Fish & wildlife branch and get permit to minimize the Beaver activities at the dam, Evaluate Failure Consequence Classification for the dam on the Hogg Creek as well as downstream and propose the Classification for the dams, Inspect the culvert spillway and  trashrack and remove/clear any log debris, Test the mechanical gates at both the reservoir and carry out necessary maintenance/replacement, etc. as needed
